NetMateWorld Designs

November 30, 2002

website

NetMateWorld is NJ-based start-up company. NetMateWorld is a virtual world on the internet delivering a number of web-based services to Internet citizens.


Complete redesign of one of the NetMateWorld's division's NetMateEducation.com
 
 
 

Complete redesign of one main entrance to the portal NetMateWorld.com
 
 
 

Complete redesign of one discount stores offprice123.com
 
 
 

Trying to pursue one style and feel for all NetMateWorld division sites
